narrative:
Ballville C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 525 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.7 percentage points.
